name: @calibre-onchain/discord-bot
description: Discord bot: ingest calibre's signed (discord_id -> display_name) identity push (#582, no user /link), resolve the <name>.<parent> subname's gg.calibre.rank over ENS, assign the matching role (W6.4); plus auto-create one channel per upcoming match from calibre's public match/market API (#580). Reads RANK from ENS only (never pulls calibre); identity via verified push.
